sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97907" key="sugkrisi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συγκρῐσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, prob. <sense id="n97907.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">σύγκρισις</ref> </xr> or <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἰδιοσυγκρισία</foreign> in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:56" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.56</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
